svg.text: ENCLOSURES, ELECTRICAL PANEL BOARDS (IN FINISHED SPACES) TO MATCH SURFACE ON
FLOORING, TYP. SEE PLANS AND ROOM FINISH SCHEDULE FOR FLOOR FINISH LOCATIONS.
CEILING HEIGHTS AND MATERIALS/FINISHES CALLED OUT IN ROOM FINISH SCHEDULE ARE FOR
ENTIRE CEILING OR MAJORITY OF THAT ROOM, UNLESS OTHERWISE INDICATED. SEE REFLECTED
SEE INTERIOR ELEVATIONS FOR MORE FINISH INFO.
